title: PMS 500g Capacity Removable Large Clear Hooks-2.7cm x 1.2 cm (Pack of 6), 2.7 cm x 1.2 cm
features: ATTRACTIVE DESIGN: The transparent design of these hooks ensures that they blend seamlessly with any interior décor, providing a neat and minimalist solution for your organizing and decorating needs. Upgrade your space today by adding these practical and stylish hooks to your cart.
HIGH-QUALITY: Our clear 500g capacity removable large clear hooks are made from durable and sturdy materials, ensuring a long-lasting and reliable solution for your organizing and decorating needs.

STRONG ADHESIVE: Featuring a powerful adhesive backing, these wall hooks can hold up to 500g and securely attach to various surfaces, including painted walls, tiles, glass, and metal, without causing any damage or leaving any residue upon removal.

VERSATILE & FUNCTIONAL: Measuring 2.7cm x 1.2cm, these removable hooks are perfect for hanging a wide range of items such as kitchen utensils, bathroom accessories, coats, bags, and even decorations. They are ideal for decluttering your home or office.

EASY TO INSTALL & REMOVE: These large clear hooks are incredibly simple to install without the need for any tools or drilling, and they are just as easy to remove whenever necessary, making them perfect for renters or those who frequently redecorate.
description: Introducing our clear 500g capacity removable large clear hooks. Measuring 2.7cm x 1.2cm and available in a convenient pack of 6, these hooks are perfect for a variety of uses around your home or office. Boasting a strong adhesive backing, they securely affix to most flat surface areas, providing a reliable hanging solution for your items. Ideal for organizing and decorating, these hooks offer a neat and clutter-free environment. Even better, they have a clear design that blends seamlessly with your decor for a sleek, unobtrusive look. Plus, they're easy to remove without damaging your walls, making them a hassle-free choice for renters or anyone who likes to change up their decor frequently.
